textPlain: Advent of computing podcast did a series on his computers, of which this is a link to one of the episodes: https://adventofcomputing.com/?guid=170d60ae-c534-46f6-968b-...

It's fun to imagine this happening in e.g. the 1860s instead of the 1930s/1940s. I believe the tech was there (because of  telegraphs), the production of relays just wasn't industrialized yet, so everything would be larger, handmade and more expensive.
